name: copilot-memory
description: Persistent memory for GitHub Copilot — store and retrieve context across sessions.

chatParticipants.name: memory
chatParticipants.description: Retrieves stored memories and uses them as context for your question.

commands.name: recall
commands.description: Recall relevant memories for your question

commands.name: save
commands.description: Save the current chat message as a memory

copilotMemory.serverUrl.description: URL of the memory-engine Rust server.

copilotMemory.autoCapture.description: Automatically capture document changes as memories.
